questions.enonce: How do you start an opinion about a social issue?
options: In my opinion, we should help more...

questions.enonce: To disagree politely, you can say 'I see your point, but I think...'.
I {{1}} with you because we need to act now. (Accepting an idea)

options: To provide reasons and evidence for our thoughts
Because it is a funny word
